Annualised returns

Absolute returns
The total return of a mutual fund over a given period.

Understand terms
Expense ratio
A fee payable to a mutual fund house for managing your mutual fund investments.     It is the total percentage of a company's fund assets used for administrative, management, advertising, and other expenses.
Tax
A percentage of your capital gains payable to the government upon exiting your mutual fund investments.     Taxation is categorized as long-term capital gains (LTCG) and short-term capital gains (STCG) depending on your holding period and the type of fund.
Exit load
A fee payable to a mutual fund house for exiting a fund (fully or partially) before the completion of a specified period from the date of investment.
Stamp duty
A form of tax payable for the purchase or sale of an asset or security.

About
JioBlackRock Money Market Fund Direct Growth
JioBlackRock Money Market Fund Direct Growth is a Debt Mutual Fund Scheme launched by JioBlackRock Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 26 May 2025. Vikrant Mehta is the Current Fund Manager of JioBlackRock Money Market Fund Direct Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹17,044 Cr and the Latest NAV as of 10 Jul 2026 is ₹1,063.79.
The JioBlackRock Money Market Fund Direct Growth is rated Low to Moderate risk. Minimum SIP Investment is set to ₹500. Minimum Lumpsum Investment is ₹500.
;
Investment Objective
The scheme seeks to generate regular income through investment in a portfolio comprising of money market instruments with residual maturity up to 1 year.
Fund benchmark
NIFTY Money Market Index A-I
